/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/usermodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/offlinemessagemodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/friendmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/friendrequestmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/groupmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/grouprequestmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o -o /home/taipingyang/learn/cpp_project/04_BridgeIM/bin/ChatServer  /home/taipingyang/thirdparty/muduo/lib/libmuduo_net.a /home/taipingyang/thirdparty/muduo/lib/libmuduo_base.a -lmysqlclient -lpthread -lhiredis
